title: First Steps in Water Seven
description: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Iceburg, Nami, Usopp, Kaku. The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Kids cry when they see us...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: -- then we'll hide in the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And Ambush the rest of the crew!!

summary: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
